brief: Retro computer-science logo exploration in an Old Mac badge direction for a portfolio hero/logo mark.
constraints: Preserve black circular dot as identity anchor
Optimize first for hero/logo mark, not favicon scale

visual_qa.compact-classic-computer-badge: Pass: clear retro computer, no text, strong dot. Risk: literal object icon.
visual_qa.rounded-beige-terminal-icon: Pass: clean terminal read, no text, strong dot. Risk: less distinct silhouette.
visual_qa.playful-retro-desktop-emblem: Mixed: strongest badge and CS signal, no text, but busier and has a small rainbow-like block that may need deterministic cleanup.

recommended_next_step: Choose one variant; if variant 3 is selected, simplify/redraw the small colored block and circuit details deterministically before site integration.

items.title: Compact Classic Computer Badge
items.review_note: Strongest literal classic-computer read; clean dot anchor; more object-icon than abstract badge.
items.risk: May feel too literal if the final site mark needs to stay very minimal.

items.title: Rounded Beige Terminal Icon
items.review_note: Cleanest rounded terminal treatment; visible grid cue; good black-dot continuity.
items.risk: Slightly less distinctive silhouette than variant 1 or 3.

items.title: Playful Retro Desktop Emblem
items.review_note: Most badge-like and clearest CS/circuit signal; fun hero-mark energy.
items.risk: Busier than the portfolio system and includes a small rainbow-like block that should be removed or redrawn if selected.
